text: # hau guidance and counselling (official source extract) source url: https://www.hau.edu.ph/campuslife/guidance-counseling source type: official hau webpage captured for thesis rag: 2026-06-30 ## core service statement the university guidance services provides guidance and counseling support programs for students who may be experiencing distress that may affect behavior within and outside the university.

pport programs for students who may be experiencing distress that may affect behavior within and outside the university. ## guidance and counselling areas - personality development - relationship concerns - time management - stress management - choice of course - sexuality education - academic difficulties - peer support group ## mental health program the mental health program aims to improve the psychological well-being of students. it includes activities for mental wellness, management of mental health concerns, psychological assessments, and referral to professionals.

ies for mental wellness, management of mental health concerns, psychological assessments, and referral to professionals. ## support populations mentioned - college students - high school students - elementary pupils - parents - faculty - visitors with student-related concerns ## guidance highlights from official content - counselors can provide listening support for relationship and personal concerns. - students experiencing stress may seek guidance office support and stress management help. - career counseling sessions are available for students undecided about course choice.

pport and stress management help. - career counseling sessions are available for students undecided about course choice. - academic counseling and consultation (including teachers/parents consultation) are available for students with academic difficulties. - peer support via guidance caring connections (gcc) is part of guidance outreach. ## safety and scope notes for chatbot grounding - guidance support is for counseling and student well-being, not medical diagnosis. - mental health concerns can involve referral to professionals. - crisis or emergency concerns should be escalated to proper guidance office and emergency services.

l to professionals. - crisis or emergency concerns should be escalated to proper guidance office and emergency services. ## official social contact channels (user-provided) - facebook (ma'am hannah - soc counselor): https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100091309162106 - facebook (sir ryan - soc counselor): https://www.facebook.com/hauguidance.soccounselor - facebook (hau guidance office official): https://www.facebook.com/hauguidanceoffice these links were provided directly by the project owner on 2026-06-30 for chatbot grounding. because facebook pages often require login, metadata extraction may be limited in automated ingestion.

hatbot grounding. because facebook pages often require login, metadata extraction may be limited in automated ingestion. ## school of computing counselor assignments (user-provided fb posts) captured from user-provided facebook post text on 2026-06-30. ### counselor: ma'am hannah - office: university guidance center (ugc) - assigned programs: - bs information technology (web development and network administration) - bs cybersecurity - support statement in post: - counseling services are available online and onsite. - students may visit or send a message for counseling services.

: - counseling services are available online and onsite. - students may visit or send a message for counseling services. - onsite schedule and location in post: - room: sjh-206 - days: monday to friday - time: 8:00 am to 5:00 pm ### shared messaging themes in both posts - ugc aims to accompany and help students during their stay on campus. - priority includes student well-being and overall success. - services include guidance on program choice and career counseling. - students are encouraged to seek support and not navigate concerns alone. - students are encouraged to follow official page updates for mental health tips and reminders.
